acceptance.assertion: A context pack includes task profile, freshness, snippets/ranges, answer-compliance template, and explicit non-claims.
The wrapper handles Lenskit query output shape without assuming a bare top-level results array.
The context pack consumes or explicitly degrades when resolved evidence query results with snippets, ranges and citations are unavailable.

goal: Add typed preflight/query/range/context-pack wrappers so delegated agents receive bounded rLens context instead of raw dumps by default.

metadata.reconcile_note: Depends on RPU-V1-T001 so Grabowski context-pack work does not paper over the missing resolved-content query surface.

title: Build rLens context pack bridge
